Appearances: Steven M. Tindall and Whitney Stark of Rukin Hyland Doria & Tindall (421.1800) with Leonard Emma (650.270.4353), N. Hoffman (362.1111) and Rosa I. Vigil-Gallenberg (via Court Call) (213.943.1343) for plaintiff and moving party; Joshua J. Cliffe of Littler Mendelson (677.3122) for defendant and responding party.
This matter was heard on the Law & Motion Calendar. Discussed and the court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: matter continued to January 25, 2012 to be heard at 9:30 am. The court overruled the objection that no responses should be provided until Davison case is resolved. Parties are directed to meet and confer regarding the issues raised in this motion before the end of the year. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
